summary: Added a top-level mode toggle that switches between the existing basic calculator and a new scientific calculator layout. Expanded the evaluator to support scientific operations and constants including `sin`, `cos`, `tan`, `log`, `ln`, `sqrt`, `abs`, `pi`, `e`, and exponentiation with `^`, plus added tests covering scientific evaluation and UI mode switching.
testingInstructions: Run `npm install`, then `npm run test`, then `npm run build` from `/Users/robertandrews/.codex/runner-workspaces/ticket-5-654HKb/worktree`. Both commands passed in this workspace.
commitMessage: Add scientific calculator mode and operations
